message:
test(time_travel): add 21 additional edge-case tests for serialization roundtrips, eviction rebase, export after evictions, boundary values (bd-3127i)

New coverage:
- CellChange serialization: EMPTY content, CONTINUATION content, max u16 coordinates
- CellChange equality: reflexive, symmetric, positional inequality
- Capacity-1 with styled cells (fg/bg/attrs preserved through eviction)
- Multiple clear/record cycles (5 cycles + final record)
- Memory usage decreases after clear
- Minimal 1x1 buffer record and rewind
- Export/import after evictions (round-trip through eviction path)
- Export/import with capacity-1
- Size change triggers full snapshot (dimensions preserved)
- CompressedFrame full with all non-default cells
- Cursor preserved through clone
- Eviction rebase preserves all retained frames (capacity=4, 6 frames)
- Pause does not affect existing frames
- find_by_hash after eviction
- FrameMetadata with zero duration, large (u64::MAX) values
- Export/import with large metadata values
- Delta with single cell change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
